  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board
    Class
    Description
    Action
    Represents the actions available to a player on a given offer tile: how many cards they may draw from the top list and how many from the bottom list.
    BoardView
    Read-only view of the Mesos board, exposing the current player positions without allowing direct state modification.
    DefaultTile
    A default (home) tile where players rest between rounds.
    OfferTile
    An offer tile that players choose during the placing phase.
    Tile
    Abstract base class representing a board tile that can hold a single player.
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Building
    Class
    Description
    BoardView
    Read-only view of the Mesos board, exposing the current player positions without allowing direct state modification.

  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game
    Class
    Description
    Board
    The Mesos game board, containing the offer tiles (where players place their totems during the placing phase) and the default tiles (where players return at the end of each round to collect food).
    BoardView
    Read-only view of the Mesos board, exposing the current player positions without allowing direct state modification.
    OfferTile
    An offer tile that players choose during the placing phase.
  • Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board used by it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Observers
    Class
    Description
    OfferTile
    An offer tile that players choose during the placing phase.

    Description
    Action
    Represents the actions available to a player on a given offer tile: how many cards they may draw from the top list and how many from the bottom list.

    An offer tile that players choose during the placing phase.
